_meta.note: This is a seed slice of the full catalog (~370 Individual Test Solutions), scraped page-by-page and verified against live product pages. Run scrape_catalog.py in an environment with outbound network access to materialize the complete catalog; the app loads whatever is in this file at startup, so re-running the scraper and overwriting this file is all that's needed to go from seed to full coverage.

products.name: 360 Digital Report
products.description: Digital 360-degree feedback report summarizing multi-rater input on an individual's workplace behavior.

products.name: 360° Multi-Rater Feedback System (MFS)
products.description: Multi-rater (360-degree) feedback system gathering input from managers, peers, and direct reports on workplace behavior and competencies.

products.name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
products.description: Widely used personality assessment measuring workplace behavioral style across 32 scales, used to understand role fit, leadership potential, and team dynamics. Provides a detailed, nuanced profile of typical working style rather than a single skill score, and is often used alongside ability tests for management, professional, and graduate hiring.

products.name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
products.description: Short (about 15 minute) self-report assessment measuring 96 discrete workplace skills/behaviors aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework (UCF). Uses a forced-choice format comparing short behavioral statements rather than a personality trait questionnaire, and is designed to give a fast, broad skills snapshot usable across hiring, onboarding, and development rather than a deep personality profile.

products.name: Java 8 (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test measuring Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC, and Java I/O fundamentals. Suited to mid-professional and professional individual contributor Java developer roles.

products.name: SHL Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
products.description: Cognitive ability test assessing how a candidate comprehends and works with numerical information presented in various formats.

products.name: Verify - Numerical Ability
products.description: Next-generation numerical reasoning test measuring the ability to derive and solve numerical problems and work with data in a realistic workplace context. 20 minutes, 16 items.

products.name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
products.description: General cognitive ability test that also yields scores on Deductive Reasoning, Inductive Reasoning, and Numerical Reasoning. Appropriate for all job levels; roughly 36 minutes plus practice.

products.name: Verify - G+
products.description: Adaptive cognitive ability test measuring Numerical, Deductive, and Inductive reasoning (30 questions, 10 per ability). Appropriate for all job levels and roles.

products.name: Verify - Verbal Ability - Next Generation
products.description: Cognitive ability test measuring verbal reasoning: reading comprehension and evaluating written arguments and statements.

products.name: SHL Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
products.description: Cognitive ability test evaluating the ability to identify patterns in data or situations and generalize that information to broader contexts.

products.name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
products.description: Online ability assessment measuring deductive reasoning: evaluating arguments, analyzing scenarios, and drawing logical conclusions. Appropriate for all job levels.

products.name: Management Scenarios
products.description: Situational-judgement style test of managerial judgement, presenting hypothetical management scenarios with response options candidates rate for effectiveness, covering managing objectives, people management, and reputation management.

products.name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
products.description: Self-report questionnaire measuring 18 dimensions of workplace motivation, profiling the situations and conditions that increase or reduce an individual's motivation to work.

products.name: Python (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test measuring Python programming, databases, modules, and libraries.

products.name: GIT (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test measuring how to use GIT for version control.

products.name: Spring (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test on Spring core, AOP, IOC container, and transactions for Java development.

products.name: Node.js (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test on Node.js: events, streams, file system, error handling, concurrency, DB handling, and the Express framework.

products.name: Swing (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test on Java Swing: components, containers, layouts, and event handling.

products.name: Typing (New)
products.description: Practical, simulation-based test evaluating typing speed and accuracy.

products.name: Automata Data Science (New)
products.description: Simulation-based test measuring the ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms to obtain desirable results.

products.name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
products.description: Simulation-based assessment of practical MS Excel skills: formulas and functions, data analysis, formatting, workbook management, and presenting data visually.

products.name: Microsoft Excel 365 - Essentials (New)
products.description: Shorter, essentials-level simulation of practical MS Excel skills covering the same core operations as the full Excel 365 simulation.

products.name: MS Office Basic Computer Literacy (New)
products.description: Multiple-choice knowledge test measuring the ability to use MS Word, MS Excel, and MS PowerPoint to perform basic computer tasks.
